title: IIIT Delhi CAI Lab Visit
subtitle: To provide students with exposure to advanced research environments and practical applications in robotics, artificial intelligence, and interdisciplinary technologies through an academic lab visit.
description: Members of BVP-OPTICA visited the Centre for Artificial Intelligence (CAI) at IIIT Delhi for an academic tour of their robotics and AI laboratories. The visit included guided demonstrations of ongoing projects, research infrastructure, and practical lab setups, followed by an insightful seminar conducted in the IIIT Delhi seminar hall by an international faculty member via Zoom.
highlights: Guided tour of Robotics and AI research labs at IIIT Delhi• Observation of real-time research setups and student projects
OPTICA core members and volunteers participated in the academic visit and seminar session.
